title: The Story of Bahurasir in the Month Dhu al -Hijjah of the Year 15 (January 637) as Related by Sayf
description: of the Year rs (January 637) as Related by Sayf According to al-Sari-Shu'ayb-Sayf-Muhammad, Talhah, alMuhallab, 'Amr, Said and al-Nacir-Ibn al-Rufayl: Then Sa'd sent Zuhrah ahead toward Bahurasir. Zuhrah left Kutha at the head of the vanguard until he arrived at Bahurasir, having had a meeting at Sabal with Shirazadh, who offered him a truce and the payment of the jiza'.22 Zuhrah sent Shirazadh to Sa'd and went with him, 20. This is what it says in the text.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 13
